user_stories.title: Interactive Graph Explorer
user_stories.i_want_to: visually navigate the connections between guests and topics
user_stories.so_that: I can discover new content serendipitously.
acceptance_criteria: Web interface displays nodes (People, Topics) and edges.
Users can click a node to see details or related episodes.
Users can filter the graph (e.g., 'Show only Product Managers').
user_stories.technical_notes: Use a JS library like `cytoscape.js` or `d3-force`.
